loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD (I-THD) as proxy for voltage THD and specific harmonics (H5/H7) — voltage harmonics and flicker/crest factor are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD (I-THD) — voltage THD and specific harmonic orders (H5/H7) are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Power Factor and True PF trends; K-factor is derived from active power as a proxy for transformer stress (no direct K-factor column measured).
